hero.title: Shaping the Future of Fun
hero.subtitle: QNTGC is a regional ecosystem of trusted retail, entertainment, lifestyle, and family experience brands — built to inspire imagination, create joy, and shape meaningful memories for every generation.

about.title: Fun Creators, Built in Qatar
about.body: Founded in 2006, Qatar National Trading Group Company is a regional leader in children's retail and entertainment. Rooted in Qatar and expanding across the Gulf, QNTGC brings together a portfolio of complementary brands across toys, creative play, entertainment venues, candies, cafés, and lifestyle experiences.

vmv.title: Vision, Mission & Values
vmv.vision: To become the leading regional and global hub of fun and creativity, shaping the future of entertainment, learning, and leisure for children and families.
vmv.mission: To grow and connect a diverse ecosystem of trusted, innovative, and complementary brands that inspire imagination, deliver excellence, and create meaningful experiences for every generation.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: Earned through consistency, quality, and care.

values.title: Creativity
values.desc: Imagination at the heart of every experience.

values.title: Collaboration
values.desc: Stronger together, across brands and borders.

brandsSection.title: A Universe of Fun
brandsSection.subtitle: Each QNTGC brand is its own world — connected by a single purpose: creating joyful experiences for families across the region.

timeline.title: Two Decades of Fun
timeline.subtitle: From a single toy retailer to a regional ecosystem of family experience brands.

events.title: Spacetoys Established
events.desc: The journey begins with a beloved toy retailer.

events.title: QNTGC & Kiddy Zone Founded
events.desc: Qatar National Trading Group launches its flagship retail chain.

events.title: Trampo Extreme Expands
events.desc: Active entertainment parks open across the GCC.

events.title: PhotoBrick Begins
events.desc: Transforming memories into brick art across continents.

events.title: Rondvill Launched
events.desc: A luxury toy experience opens at Katara’s Gift Building.

events.title: Candyvill Launched
events.desc: A bright candy destination joins the family.

events.title: L’Art du Café Established
events.desc: A refined café experience opens in Katara.

events.title: West Fun Launches
events.desc: A new family entertainment hub at West Walk Qatar.

events.title: Ecolandia Opens
events.desc: A safe learning playground for the youngest explorers.

events.title: Regional & Global Expansion
events.desc: Building the future of fun, beyond borders.

market.title: Rooted in Qatar. Expanding Across the Region.
market.subtitle: From a single store in Doha to a network spanning the Gulf, Australia, and the United States.

csr.title: Fun With Purpose
csr.body: At QNTGC, joy comes with responsibility. We invest in our communities, support families and children, and operate with care for the environment that future generations will inherit.

pillars.title: Community Support
pillars.desc: Toy giveaways, family programs, and partnerships across Qatar.

pillars.title: Health Awareness
pillars.desc: Long-standing collaborations with Qatar Cancer Society’s Alghabga and Sedra.

pillars.title: Diversity & Inclusion
pillars.desc: Welcoming spaces for every child, every family, every story.

pillars.title: Environmental Care
pillars.desc: Biodegradable bags reducing waste by more than 23 tons annually.

leadership.title: A Message From Our Leaders
leadership.ceoMessage: Fun is not just entertainment. It is the foundation for growth, learning, and the meaningful connections that shape who we become. At QNTGC, every brand we build is a chapter in that story.
leadership.cooMessage: We turn vision into action through operations, collaboration, and a relentless focus on quality, safety, and seamless brand experiences — from the smallest detail to the largest opening day.

future.title: Building the Future of Fun
future.body: QNTGC is building on its success in the Gulf and expanding internationally. Guided by trust, creativity, innovation, and excellence, the group aims to redefine family entertainment, joyful learning, and lifestyle experiences for generations to come.

contact.title: Let’s Build Something Joyful Together
contact.subtitle: Whether you’re a supplier, mall, media, or family — we’d love to hear from you.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject

info.address: B2 Building, Salwa Road, Al Waab, Doha, Qatar
